codeReview.summary: Fail. I reviewed the prior round-2 review/synthesis, the fix feature handoff and transcript skeleton, the 2c9ca1d implementation diff, and current HEAD. No relevant post-round-2 changes landed in `src/content/execution-plans.ts` or `src/content/__tests__/execution-plans.test.ts` (`git diff 2c9ca1d..HEAD -- src/content/execution-plans.ts src/content/__tests__/execution-plans.test.ts` is empty), so the same two VAL-ROADMAP-016 blockers remain unresolved at current HEAD.

issues.description: Current HEAD still leaves the `pe-terminal-open` audit gate non-observable. The criterion says `A named third-party security firm publishes or provides BETTER a completed audit report covering smart-contract and execution-layer surfaces`, so the gate can still be satisfied by a private report merely provided to BETTER rather than an investor-verifiable public proof surface. This matches the prior round-2 blocker unchanged.

Current HEAD still leaves the `re-enterprise-data` proof gate internally framed. The criterion says `At least one institutional client completes a paid pilot with a signed data-licensing agreement and documented API usage over ≥ 30 days`, but both the agreement and the usage evidence can remain private between BETTER and the client, so this is still not an externally observable / investor-verifiable success criterion under VAL-ROADMAP-016. This matches the prior round-2 blocker unchanged.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker still reported `skillFeedback.followedProcedure=true` even though the transcript skeleton does not show any required `.factory/library/*.md` read before the first edit.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `/Users/test/vision/.factory/skills/content-strategy-worker/SKILL.md:20-21` requires reading the relevant `.factory/library/*.md` files before changing anything. For worker session `5d66e932-4b1b-4acd-ba24-6ed0b53ef78a`, a transcript check on the skeleton before the first `## Tool: Edit` returns `HAS_LIBRARY_READ_BEFORE_EDIT=False`, while the handoff `/Users/test/.factory/missions/33dae310-26cf-4368-9488-64b235b6db83/handoffs/2026-03-23T03-46-04-484Z__investor-roadmap-execution-plan-coverage-and-proof-gate-observability-fix__5d66e932-4b1b-4acd-ba24-6ed0b53ef78a.json` still reports `"followedProcedure": true`.

summary: Fail.
